shortDescription: Bright 2-bedroom condo in Little Portugal with floor-to-ceiling windows and stunning city views.
fullDescription: Welcome to 870 Dundas Street West, Unit 305 in the vibrant Little Portugal neighbourhood. This well-appointed condominium suite delivers effortless urban living with premium amenities. The main living area showcases original architectural details alongside tasteful modern updates. The kitchen has been fully renovated with soft-close cabinetry, stone counters, and a breakfast bar. Upstairs, 2 bright bedrooms include a primary retreat with ensuite and double closets. Additional highlights include in-suite laundry, ample storage, and energy-efficient mechanicals. Enjoy a 90+ walk score with parks, cafes, schools, and transit all within minutes.
keyFeatures: Modern eat-in kitchen with stainless steel appliances
